title: task
description: node_server.py:354-391 - When _handle_rx receives packet early and breaks out of loop, the RxTimeoutEvent scheduled by start_receive() remains in queue. Although guarded by state check, causes event queue pollution with stale events over many RX operations. Not a crash, but wastes memory and processing.
close_reason: Fixed: Added exit_rx_mode() call after RX loop to cancel pending RxTimeoutEvent when packet received early, preventing event queue pollution
